commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 02 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with the tightest spreads across all metrics (ILLIQ: 0.0013, Roll: 0.8883%, AR: 0.3651%), reflecting deep order books in US equities. Nasdaq 100 follows closely as the second most liquid venue. The LSE significantly lags at rank five, with ILLIQ measuring 124x higher than NYSE and widest AR spreads (0.7513%), suggesting substantially lower trading depth. European exchanges occupy middle positions, with SIX Swiss Exchange demonstrating relatively efficient pricing despite rank four placement.
